title: accusé de réception sri-lankais de l'instrument français

pages.text:
Minister of Foreign Affairs

dri Lanka

8 September 1982

Excellency,

I have received on 5th August, 1982

your letter dated 28th July, 1982 informing ne that the Procedure required by the

Constitution of the Republic of France for the enforcement of the Double Taxation

Convention signed in Colombo, on 17tł

September, 1981,

between our

two countries

has been completed.

1 am pleased to inform you that the

Government of Sri Lanka is proceeding with the necessary steps required by law to bring the Convention into force.

I shall address

Your Excellency when these steps are completed.

Please accept, Your Excellency, the

assurances of my highest consideration.

A. C.S. Hameed.

Honourable Mr Claude Cheysson,

Minister for External Relations,

Republic

of France.
